prompt: what did we do this session? i want a summary

assertions.text: Output runs git status/diff and grounds the summary in actual file changes (not just vague recollection)
Output extracts at least one decision worth logging (session had real changes so decisions exist)
Output includes the final closeout block with all 4 fields: summary, decisions logged, priorities updated, memory saved
Output explicitly checks context/current-priorities.md for whether it needs updating
